name: node-yargs
title: node-yargs
description:
command line parser for nodejs
Yargs helps you build interactive command line tools by parsing arguments and
generating an elegant user interface.
.
Yargs gives you:
* commands and (grouped) options (like module run -n --force),
* a dynamically generated help menu based on your arguments,
* bash-completion shortcuts for commands and options.
.
With yargs, ye be havin' a map that leads straight to yer treasure! Treasure
of course, being a simple option hash.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-yargs because command line parser for nodejs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-yargs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-yargs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-yargs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
